vancode/manager/configurator

  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Types
    • BrowserSync
    • CompilationPolicy
    • CompilationSettings
    • ConfigType
    • PolicyName
    • Requirement
    • TargetSource
    • TimConfig
  • Procs
        $
      • `$`(c: TimConfig): string
        generateYaml
      • generateYaml(c: TimConfig): string
        getBasePath
      • getBasePath(config: TimConfig): string

Types

BrowserSync = ref object
  port*: Port
  delay*: uint
CompilationPolicy = object
CompilationSettings = object
  target*: TargetSource
  source*, output*: string
  layoutsPath*, viewsPath*, partialsPath*: string
  basePath*: string
  policy*: CompilationPolicy
  release*: bool
ConfigType = enum
  typeProject = "project", typePackage = "package"
PolicyName = enum
  policyAny = "any",        ## Allow all features (default)
  policyStdlib = "stdlib",  ## Allow usage of the standard library
  policyPackages = "packages", ## Allow usage of packages
  policyImports = "imports", ## Allow import statements
  policyLoops = "loops",    ## Allow for loops and while loops
  policyConditionals = "conditionals", ## Allow conditionals
  policyAssignments = "assignments", ## Allow variable assignments
  policyLoadDynlib = "loadDynlib" ## Allow loading dynamic libraries via FFI
Requirement = object
TargetSource = enum
  tsNim = "nim", tsJS = "js", tsHtml = "html", tsRuby = "rb", tsPython = "py"
TimConfig = ref object
  name*: string              ## Name of the package or project
                             ## This must be a valid identifier
  version*: string           ## The version of the package
  description*: string       ## A short description of the package
  license*: string           ## The license of the package
                             ## See https://spdx.org/licenses/ for more information
  requires*: seq[string]     ## A list of requirements for the package
                             ## Each requirement must be a valid identifier
                             ## and can be a version range, e.g. "tim >= 0.1.0"
  case
  of ConfigType.typeProject:
    compilation*: CompilationSettings
    browser_sync*: BrowserSync
  else:
    nil

Procs

proc `$`(c: TimConfig): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generate a string representation of the TimConfig using pkg/voodoo 
proc generateYaml(c: TimConfig): string {.
    ...raises: [Exception, OpenParserJsonError, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Generate a YAML representation of the TimConfig This is used to generate the tim.yml file 
proc getBasePath(config: TimConfig): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
